items.summary: Audit the frontend canister actor initialization code (in useActor.ts and any related config files such as canister_ids.json, dfx.json, or environment variable resolution) and fix any mismatch between the deployed backend canister ID and the ID the frontend is using to create the actor, so that the 'Backend actor not available. Please check your connection.' error is resolved and the app connects successfully to the DroneWash Motoko canister.
